name: plan-simple
description: Agent writes a plan using the write_plan tool in plan mode

turns.user: Create a plan for adding user authentication to the app.

input.title: Add User Authentication
input.content:
## Steps
1. Add a users table to the database with email, hashed password, and created_at columns
2. Implement signup endpoint with password hashing via bcrypt
3. Implement login endpoint that returns a JWT token
4. Add JWT middleware to protect authenticated routes
5. Write unit tests for auth handlers and middleware

responses.text: I've written a plan for adding user authentication. It covers database schema, signup/login endpoints, JWT middleware, and testing.
